name: Task Bubble
description: A translucent floating bubble that keeps your current task visible on any page.

edit-task-bubble.description: Add tasks to the task bubble

toggle-task-queue.description: Show or hide the task queue

toggle-task-history.description: Show or hide completed task history

complete-task-bubble.description: Mark the current task done and move to the next queued task

toggle-task-timer.description: Pause or resume the task timer
